SELECT *, now() AS queried_time FROM current_time_test;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current_time_test WHERE event_time > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
CREATE TABLE timezone_test (id Int32, event_time DateTime);
SELECT id, event_time, now() AS current_time FROM timezone_test WHERE event_time > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR;
SELECT event_time, now('Europe/London') AS london_time FROM timezone_test WHERE event_time = (SELECT MAX(event_time) FROM timezone_test);
SELECT event_time, now() AS current_time FROM current_time_test ORDER BY queried_time DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT event_time, now('UTC') AS utc_time FROM timezone_test WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM timezone_test WHERE event_time < now() - INTERVAL 2 DAY);
